lane: Human Regenerated Clip Review Decision Apply
project: AI Video Production Workspace Three Route Plan
title: Human Regenerated Clip Review Decision Apply
scope: read the Jenn-filled R3-9K regenerated clip review table
parse exactly one human decision per regenerated clip: accept, reject, or regenerate_requested
apply accepted regenerated clips to local review state and app database
write a review decision apply report with accepted/rejected/regenerate_requested counts
do not call providers, regenerate clips, batch-expand, assemble final video, read env files or credentials, overwrite source assets, or deploy
goal: Apply Jenn's completed R3-9K human review decisions for the four regenerated RunningHub clips, making accepted clips eligible for final assembly readiness checks.
acceptance: R3-9K review table is parsed as the source of truth.
Exactly 4 regenerated clip rows are parsed.
Each row has exactly one decision among accept, reject, and regenerate_requested.
Accepted rows update the corresponding shot review state and accepted_clip_artifact_id to the R3-9J regenerated clip artifact.
Rejected or regenerate_requested rows preserve Jenn's notes and keep final assembly blocked.
Report includes per-shot decision, reviewer, note, regenerated clip artifact id, prior rejected clip artifact id, and local video path.
Report includes summary counts for accept, reject, and regenerate_requested.
If all 4 shots are accepted, report marks final assembly readiness check as the next safe task, not final assembly execution.

Report records network_call_attempted=false, runninghub_called=false, runway_called=false, provider_credits_consumed=false, real_video_generated=false, regeneration_performed=false, batch_generation_performed=false, final_assembly_performed=false, env_files_read=false, credentials_read=false, source_assets_overwritten=false, secret_values_exposed=false.
validation: R3-9K review table parse / required decisions check
JSON parse for generated R3-9L decision apply report
claimed_by: Codex R3-9L human regenerated clip review decision apply
completed_by: Codex R3-9L human regenerated clip review decision apply
boundary_or_safety_stop: decision apply only; no provider call, regeneration execution, final assembly, env or credential read, source overwrite, or deployment
safe_actions_completed: Parsed Jenn's R3-9K review table with exactly 4 regenerated clip rows.
Applied 4 accept decisions to local review state.
Set accepted_clip_artifact_id for each shot to the corresponding R3-9J regenerated clip artifact.
Cleared stale rejection reasons on approved shots.
Generated the R3-9L decision apply report.
Recorded final assembly readiness check as the next safe task without executing final assembly.
Validated table parse, JSON parse, npm run typecheck, npm run test:m1, npm run secret:scan, and git diff --check.
options_for_jenn: After R3-9L completes, proceed to a final assembly readiness check only if all required shots have accepted clips.
If any regenerated clip is rejected or marked regenerate_requested, prepare the next local repair strategy instead of final assembly.
next_safe_option: Run a separate final assembly readiness check before any final assembly execution.
